disclaimer: Operator-entered mechanical / chassis conditions (F8). Never inferred from Mode 01/03 alone. Ids are cascade-edge antecedent targets (`manualCondition`).

conditions.label: Brake pads thin
conditions.description: Pads visibly worn or near minimum thickness on inspection.

conditions.label: Pads metal-on-metal
conditions.description: Backing plate contact / grinding — pads consumed.

conditions.label: Rotors scored / grooved
conditions.description: Rotor friction surface scored, grooved, or heat-checked.

conditions.label: Brake fluid dark / overdue
conditions.description: Fluid looks dark or service interval long overdue — moisture/corrosion risk.

conditions.label: Caliper stuck / seized
conditions.description: Uneven pad wear, hot wheel, or caliper that will not retract freely.

conditions.label: Hub bearing growl / hum
conditions.description: Growl or hum that changes with cornering load — operator-heard, not from OBD.

conditions.label: CV axle click on turn
conditions.description: Clicking on lock-steer / sharp turns (classic outer CV joint).

conditions.label: Serpentine belt cracked
conditions.description: Cracks, glazing, missing chunks, or frayed edges on the accessory belt.

conditions.label: Coolant hose soft / swollen
conditions.description: Radiator or heater hose soft, swollen, or oil-softened on squeeze.
